message:
fix(agent_config): preserve backup_created flag through apply errors

Replace plain String error in apply_prepared_agent_config() with a
structured AgentConfigApplyError that carries both the message and the
backup_created flag.  Previously, if the write step failed after a
successful backup, the error path reported backup_created: false,
misleading callers about the on-disk state.

Changes:
- Add AgentConfigApplyError { message, backup_created } struct
- Thread backup_created through each map_err site so the flag survives
  directory-creation, backup-copy, and write failures
- Update the run() error-handling call site to destructure the new type
- Populate content_preview in build_agent_configure_error_plan_item so
  dry-run errors still show what would have been written
- Add unix-only test (apply_agent_config_preserves_backup_flag_on_write_error)
  that makes the target read-only, verifies backup_created is true, and
  asserts the error message mentions "Failed to write"

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
